name: Danish Kringle
recipeIngredient: Milk to make a Thick drizzle
recipeInstructions: Preparation: Cut the butter and flour together (like pie crust) and then add water. Mix and press into a jelly roll pan. Bring the water and butter to a boil in a saucepan. Remove from heat and add the flour all at once, stirring with a wooden spoon until it forms a ball that is clean from the saucepan. If it is too hot, cool it down slightly and then add the eggs one at a time, stirring until the mixture is smooth with a wooden spoon. Add almond extract. Spread carefully on the bottom (unbaked) dough layer. Bake at 375°F for 45 to 50 minutes, until light golden brown. When cool, drizzle with icing.
